title: rhododendron × caucasicoarboreum
intro: Rhododendron × caucasicoarboreum, a rare and hybrid plant species, is a cross between Rhododendron caucasicum and Rhododendron arboreum. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat coughs, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron × caucasicoarboreum are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
